name: Rossi Real Estate (ROSSIDG.LOCAL)
message: Rossi Real Estate Corp. is a trusted family-owned and operated real estate brokerage company with over 30 years of experience in the Chicagoland real estate market. They specialize in providing active, hands-on management services, hassle-free brokerage services, and well-informed investment management and analysis to help companies of all sizes create value and grow their impact on customers.
